skills.name: Pole of Agony
skills.description: Summon a pillar of darkness that constantly inflicts pain on enemies who come in contact with it. Targets continue to receive momentary damage even after moving away from the pillar, but that damage weakens over time.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2 per 0.5 seconds
Target: CaptionRatio3
Magic circle duration: 5 seconds
Additional damage for CaptionRatio2 seconds
30% increased damage against blinded enemies

skills.name: Invocation
skills.description: Summon evil spirits periodically or from fallen enemies. The summoned spirits remain in the field to await your orders. Up to 10 spirits can be summoned. [Evil Sacrifice] can be used to target enemies for the spirits to attack. [Evil Sacrifice] can be used to select a target for the spirits to attack.
skills.effect_text:
Spirit Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Spirit Duration: 35 seconds
30% increased damage against blinded enemies

skills.name: Dark Theurge
skills.description: Summons evil spirits that attack at your bidding. [Evil Sacrifice] can be used to target enemies for the spirits to attack.
skills.effect_text:
Spirit Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x CaptionRatio2
Spirit Duration: 30 seconds
30% increased damage against blinded enemies

skills.name: Mastema
skills.description: Lays a curse upon enemies and applies [Stigma] debuff to the enemies. Enemies under [Stigma] debuff are unable to recover HP, SP, and become higher priority attack targets.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio2
[Stigma] lasts for 20 seconds

skills.name: Evil Sacrifice
skills.description: Sacrifices nearby enemies to Evil Spirits. The Evil Spirits fly towards the enemies within range to damage them. Evil spirits fly faster in proportion to the skill level from Lv.2
skills.effect_text:
Level 1 Master
30% increased damage against blinded enemies

skills.name: Ghastly Trail
skills.description: Make the summoned Evil Spirits follow the summoner in a line. The increase in damage will continue for 6 seconds after channeling ends.
skills.effect_text:
Evil Spirits damage increase: + CaptionRatio %
Max Duration: 10 seconds
Requires summoned Evil Spirits

skills.name: Demon Scratch
skills.description: Create a magic circle in front of you that summons the demon's arm. The summoned demon disappears after attacking forwards.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Increases damage against enemies under [Blind] debuff by 30%

attributes.name: Pole of Agony: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Pole of Agony] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Invocation: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Invocation] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Dark Theurge: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dark Theurge] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Evil Spirit: Darkness
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by Evil Spirits have a 10% chance per attribute level to be afflicted with [Blind] for 10 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Evil Spirit: Darkness
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by Evil Spirits have a 10% chance per attribute level to be afflicted with [Blind] for 10 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Mastema: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Mastema] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Mastema: Reduced Threat
attributes.description:
* Reduces threat values generated on enemies with the initial damage of [Mastema] by 1% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Mastema: Phantom Pain
attributes.description:
* Enemies damaged by [Mastema] receive damage per every 0.8 seconds for 20 seconds

* The caster's Magic Attack x [attribute level] x 15% is used as attack value

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Invocation: Demon Spirit
attributes.description:
* Increases chance of summoning high-level evil spirits by 1% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Demon Scratch: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Demon Scratch] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Darkness Fear
attributes.description:
* Enemies attacked with [Mastema], [Pole of Agony], or [Demon Scratch] receive the [Fear] debuff

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Darkness Fear
attributes.description:
* Enemies attacked with [Mastema], [Pole of Agony], or [Demon Scratch] receive the [Fear] debuff

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Darkness Fear
attributes.description:
* Enemies attacked with [Mastema], [Pole of Agony], or [Demon Scratch] receive the [Fear] debuff

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Dark Theurge: Tough Evil Spirit
attributes.description:
* Applies double the hits with [Dark Theurge]

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Warlock: Darkness
attributes.description: * Final Damage increases by [5 + attribute level x 2]% when attacking with Warlock skill

attributes.name: [Arts] Pole of Agony: Evil Spirit
attributes.description:
* One evil spirit is summoned every 0.5 sec near [Pole of Agony]

* The effect of [Invocation: Demon Spirit] is applied

* The Skill Factor of spirits created is equal to that of [Pole of Agony]

* If you do not have [Pole of Agony] learned, the arts effect will not activate

attributes.name: [Arts] Pole of Agony: Evil Spirit
attributes.description:
* One evil spirit is summoned every 0.5 sec near [Pole of Agony]

* The effect of [Invocation: Demon Spirit] is applied

* The Skill Factor of spirits created is equal to that of [Pole of Agony]

* If you do not have [Pole of Agony] learned, the arts effect will not activate

attributes.name: [Arts] Pole of Agony: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Pole of Agony] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Invocation] by 1.25% per attribute level
